prestazioni: Hyundai G1.6T-GDI (Smartstream G1.6 T-GDi) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2867R Gen II turbocharger (846717-5003S) paired with a custom 3.5-inch downpipe (APR Carbon Fiber) and a Hyundae-specific intercooler (Mishimoto MMINT-HYN-16) to reduce intake temps by 30°C under full boost (22 psi peak).

ECU recalibration via Alientech KESS3 with a Stage 2+ custom tune (by Dyno Dynamics Australia) targeting 320 hp and 380 Nm on E85 fuel, utilizing a high-flow fuel pump (Walbro 450 LPH) and upgraded injectors (Siemens Deka 875cc).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G25-2WL) for the HTRAC AWD system, paired with a custom driveshaft (The Driveshaft Shop) and upgraded CV axles (Neapco 2-0195) to handle increased torque without failure.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Ioniq 6 widebody kit (LB-IONIQ6-WB) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny-inspired front splitter (Seibon Carbon) and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing (AIT Racing ARW-1000).

Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat (by VViViD Air-Tint) and aggressive camber setup (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear) using Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with 24-way damping adjustment and Swift Springs (8K/10K rates).

Full interior overhaul: Recaro Sportster CS seats (with custom Alcantara upholstery by Katzkin), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK) integrated with a bolt-in harness bar (Sparco Pro 2000).
